Quests.Name: First Journey
Quests.Description: Travel to Alpha Centauri to register your ship with the Atlas Federation.

Quests.Name: Barnard Recon
Quests.Description: The Federation wants a status report on Barnard's Star. Fly there and scan the system.

Quests.Name: Research Materials
Quests.Description: Transport experimental materials from Vega to the researchers at Cygnus Station.

Quests.Name: Tribune Signal
Quests.Description: A strange signal is coming from the Tribune system. Investigate its origin.

Quests.Name: Rescue the Princess
Quests.Description: The princess of Proxima fled her wedding and is now drifting in a lifepod somewhere in the system. Find her and bring her back to the station.

Dialogs.Text: My ship was destroyed by pirates! Please come and rescue me!
Dialogs.Speaker: Princess Verna

Dialogs.Text: Thank you for rescuing me! My engineers have developed a new type of engine that may help you on your journey. Please accept it!
Dialogs.Speaker: Princess Verna

Quests.Name: Special Cargo
Quests.Description: Deliver special cargo to Alpha Centauri Station

Dialogs.Text:
Hey you....yes you....I have a proposition. I see that you are a trader of goods. How would you like an upgrade to your beautiful vessel that will allow you to carry more cargo?

I need this package delivered to my contact in Centauri. I would deliver it myself, but I have run into...difficulties that must be dealt with.
Dialogs.Speaker: Shady Man in Suit

Dialogs.Text:
Head 1: Ah, brothers! I do believe this one has what we are waiting for!

Head 2: Are you shhhure about thishh Kashhhper? He doeshhh not look like the other...

Head 3: Why yyyes Kashim, this one dddoes look dddifferent

Kasper: There's nothing to fear Kirke, see? He is presenting the package that we were waiting for.

Kashim: Ah yeshhh, thishhh is jushhht what we needed

Kirke: Bbbbe cccareful oooopening iiitt...

Kasper: No fear. It is exactly what we needed. You traveler have done your job. We will give you the upgrade as per the agreement. 

*Kasper looks you over*

Kasper: You appear to be very skilled. We may have another job for you that will lead to further rewards
Dialogs.Speaker: 3-Headed Vlorpol

Quests.Name: Hunt the Hunter
Quests.Description: Kasper, Kashim, and Kirke have a new mission for you.

Dialogs.Text: Kasper: Ah, I see you wish to take the next quest. Good! We have been having issues with a certain....armed individual...who wishes to do us harm. Luckily we have his location. Head to the barnard system and...deal with him, please?
Dialogs.Speaker: 3 Headed

Dialogs.Text: Kasper: Very good! I knew we could count on you! Return to us when you desire another mission!
Dialogs.Speaker: 3-Headed Vlorpol
